title: bouchea pseudochascanum
intro: Bouchea pseudochascanum, also known as the Mexican chamomile, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Bouchea pseudochascanum include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
